race.comment: EXIT FEE (1) frustrating gelding who loomed strongly on resumption with a narrow second over 1000m at Gosford. Out to his right trip today and will appreciate the softer conditions. Tempo suits and sure to go close. WAYBURN (9) lightly raced gelding heading in the right direction. Comes to town third-up after scoring a comfortable on-pace win over 1200m at Ipswich. Has options from the draw and shapes as the main danger. JUDITH'S REVENGE (18) progressive Wagga-trained filly who deserves her chance in town. Savaged the line when second over 1400m at Wagga with the 59.5kg. Drops 5kg for this and gets the right set-up. NEESON (7) stalked the good speed first-up with a fighting second over 1200m at Wagga. Has good second-up credentials and stays in the mix. BULLION HUNTER (11) maps well and can run the trip.
